summary: C++ compilation error in pandas SIMD header file (moments_simd.hpp line 255) during meson setup on macOS 15 py312. The error triggered metadata generation failure during package build.
root_cause: Compilation error in pandas/_libs/include/pandas/simd/moments_simd.hpp at line 255, column 50, detected during meson setup while generating package metadata.

evidence.reason: Explicit C++ compiler error at the specified file, line 255, and column 50 during build
Package metadata generation failed as a direct result of compilation errors
C++ compiler reported 2 errors in this compilation unit

evidence.quote: × Encountered error while generating package metadata.
evidence.reason: Confirms the build subprocess failed while compiling code
The meson/compiler subprocess exited with nonzero status

suggested_fix: Inspect the full compilation error message at pandas/_libs/include/pandas/simd/moments_simd.hpp:255:50. This is likely a SIMD instruction set compatibility issue on macOS 15 (ARM64 architecture); review xsimd-neon64 support or SIMD variant selection for this platform.
